title: Bolsius Smooth Pillar Candles - White - 4-Pack - 15 x 6 cm - Length Burning Time 42 Hours - Unscented - Includes Natural Plant Wax - Without Palm Oil
features: The clear white colour of Cloudy White will give your interior a fresh accent and is a real bridging colour, which means that it combines beautifully with all other colours from Bolsius's collection of rustic candles.

Bolsius 'Essentials' candles in a smooth finish are essential in any interior. Various sizes and shades can be combined to suit your personal preference. Elegant and subtle! Crafted with passion for people and the planet, using natural vegan wax made from olive oil, sunflower oil or rapeseed oil, and palm oil free. Every season, we introduce new trend colours, so that you can keep your interior up to date.

Since 1870, Bolsius has been making quality products to create cosiness and a warm ambience in your home. We do this with passion, skilled craftsmanship and a love for people and planet. Bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that tickle the senses. It's how you can make every moment a special one. For yourself and for everyone around you.
